title: original data
author: Tan, Lina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Purpose  Provides supporting data for the study "Machine Learning and Experimental Validation Reveal Autophagy-Linked Biomarkers in Microvascular Injury after Cardiac Ischemia/Reperfusion", facilitating reproducibility of results. 
 Content Structure 1. Bioinformatic Analysis 
 •Directory: /01_Bioinformatics_Analysis/ 
 •Contents: This directory contains the complete results of the bioinformatic pipeline for identifying and validating autophagy-linked biomarkers. It includes: 
     •Differential Expression Analysis: Results from identifying Differentially Expressed Genes (DEGs/). 
     •Functional Enrichment: Results from Gene Ontology (GO/), KEGG pathway (KEGG/), and Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA/). 
     •Machine Learning for Feature Selection: Code and results from multiple algorithms used to refine biomarker signatures, including Support Vector Machine (SVM-REF/), Random Forest (randomForest/), and LASSO regression (lasso/, lasso-venn/). 
     •Diagnostic Model Building & Validation: Files related to constructing a clinical predictive model, including a Nomogram (nomogram diagram/) and Receiver Operating Characteristic curve analysis (ROC/). 
     •Additional Analyses: Results from immune infiltration analysis (immune/), disease association (disease/), and clustering analysis (cluster/). 
     •Validation Sets: Data and results from the test and validation cohorts (test validation/). 
     •Various Intersection Analyses: Venn diagram results (venn/) comparing gene lists from different methods. 
 2. Experimental Validation 
 •Directory: /02_Experimental_Validation/ 
 •Contents: Myocardial tissue section staining images (jpg/png), qPCR quantitative data (xlsx), Western blot raw images (TIFF), tunel (TIF), TEM (TIFF). 
  Methodology  
 Data Collection •Bioinformatic Data: RNA-seq data from mouse models sourced from the GEO database ( G  SE108940  ,   GSE115568  ,   GSE4105  ,   GSE58486  ,   GSE61592  ,   GSE83472 ) 
 •Experimental Data: C57bl/6J I/R model, sampling time points: ischemia 45minutes and reperfusion 2h (n=4/group); Cardiac Microvascular Endothelial Cells (CMECs) H/R model, sampling time points: hypoxia induction 24h and reoxygenation 24h (n=3/group). 
 Software Requirements 
 
 
 
 
 Tool 
 
 
 Version 
 
 
 Purpose 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 R 
 
 
 v4.3.3 
 
 
 bioinformatic analysis 
 
 
 
 
 ImageJ 
 
 
 Fiji-2.3.0 
 
 
 Image analysis 
 
 
 
 
 GraphPad Prism 
 
  8.0 
  quantitative analysis 
 
 
 
 Abbreviations 
 
 
 
 
 
 Abbreviation 
 
 
 Full Term 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 I/R 
 
 
 Ischemia/Reperfusion 
 
 
 
 
 H/R 
 
 
 Hypoxia/reoxygenation 
 
 
 
 
 DEGs 
 
 
 Differentially Expressed Genes 
 
 
 
 
 TEM 
 
 
 Transmission Electron Microscopy (for autophagosome verification) 
 
 
 
 
 GSEA 
 
 
 Gene Set Enrichment Analysis 
 
 
 
 
 TTC 
 
 
 Evans blue and 2,3,5-triphenyltetrazolium chloride
